summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Apollonius problem + Descartes circle theorem. 3 mutually-tangent circles (BLUE/GREEN/ORANGE with radii 2, 2, 1.5 scaled). ValueTracker s_tr animates YELLOW inner Soddy circle (k_4^+) then RED outer Soddy circle (k_4^-) with centers derived from complex-coord Descartes formula. Live k_1..k_4 curvatures + identity.
